AK DOH Eligibility

Alaska Medicaid income eligibility — applies the APA 10-step exclusion chain, reasonable compatibility check (523B), and Expanded Refused Cash Income Limits.

Examples:

Client-Stated Income

Client-stated gross monthly earned income before any exclusions
Unused portion of $20/month general income exclusion (step 5)
Household type code for income standard lookup
Calendar year for income limit (e.g. 2026)

Optional Exclusions (Client)

Impairment-related work expenses (step 7)
Verified work expenses of a blind individual (step 9)
Income excluded by federal law (step 1)
EITC advance or Child Tax Credit payment (step 2)
Infrequent/irregular earned income this month (step 3)
Blind/disabled student under age 22 (step 4)
Monthly cap for student income exclusion (e.g. $2,410 for 2026)
Income used in SSA/DVR self-support plan (step 10)

DOL Electronic Wage Data

True when DOL has wage records for this client (523B action 5 requires manual verification when false)
Most recent quarter from DOL/Workforce Development (monthly = quarterly ÷ 3)
Mirror of client field for DOL comparison run
Mirror of client IRWE for DOL comparison run
Mirror of client blind work expenses for DOL comparison run
Mirror of client federal exclusions for DOL run
Mirror of client EITC for DOL run
Mirror of client irregular income for DOL run
Mirror of client student income for DOL run
Mirror of client student monthly limit for DOL run
Mirror of client self-support exclusion for DOL run

Eligibility Decision

Alaska DOH Medicaid Income Eligibility — Powered by Catala compiled rules · API docs
